title: Forensic Use SOP Checklist — cpp-cpm-engine
description: Machine-readable form of the 14-step analyst checklist from FORENSIC_USE_SOP.md. Closes AUDIT_LEDGER_v2.9.34.md row #17.

sop_version.description: Semver of the SOP this checklist conforms to. Matches the engine version FORENSIC_USE_SOP.md is aligned to.

engine_version.description: Engine version used for the analysis. Must match the version cited in the deliverable's report manifest.

signature_method.description: Free-form signature method (wet ink, e-sign, Sigstore, etc.). Cryptographic signing is roadmap (ledger row #16).

computed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this checklist was finalized.

steps.description: Exactly 14 step entries, matching FORENSIC_USE_SOP.md Steps 1–14.

na_reason.description: Required when status = 'n/a'. Must be substantive (>= 8 chars).

evidence.description: Step-specific captured fields. Required when status = 'done'. Shape varies per step — see docs/sop-checklist-schema.md and scripts/validate-sop.js for the per-step required keys.

analyst_note.description: Free-form analyst note for the step.
